description: Single curve: one inner region (node 1) inside the outer background (node 0)
Two disjoint curves: two sibling inner regions, both children of root
Two nested curves: one curve inside another (chain of depth 2)
Three disjoint curves: all three inner regions are direct children of root
One outer curve with two inner sibling regions nested inside it
Two outer regions; one contains a nested region
Four disjoint curves at root level
Four nested curves forming a chain of depth 4
Two outer curves each containing one inner region
Complex branching structure with nesting depth 3
